creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 178957
fix build with gcc6

Builds fine with libc++ 4.0 as well. For an old FreeBSD release try:

  # astro/xplanet/Makefile.local
  CXXFLAGS += -nostdinc++ -isystem /path/to/libcxx/include

> +	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC}/src -name "*.cpp"|${XARGS} -tI{} ${REINPLACE_CMD} \
> +		-e "/getline/ s|[!=]= NULL||" {}

- Replace "|${XARGS} -tI{} ... {}" with "-exec ... {} +"
- Replace "== NULL" with ".fail()" to avoid inverse logic
